name: adventureworks-web-e2e
// targets: to see all targets run: nx show project adventureworks-web-e2e --web

e2e.// dependsOn: The @nx/playwright/plugin infers a dependency on adventureworks-web:serve (default 'development' config), which would bind port 4200 with the dev-tenant environment before playwright.config.ts's own webServer (serve:playwright, test-tenant environment) gets a chance to start on the same port. Overriding to [] lets Playwright's webServer be the sole thing that starts the dev server.
